requests.reason: Register the new typed `remote` command without moving SSH/worker policy into the shared registry.
requests.integration_note: Use argsCommand(remoteCommand). The command owns readiness, local machine-registry diagnostics, and the SSH stdio worker bootstrap; it is not itself exposed as a generic remote or Telegram CommandContract tool.

requests.reason: Add `remote` to the lightweight help/manifest surface.

metadata.summary: Inspect official Remote readiness and run the proof-aware SSH stdio worker

requests.reason: After the shared registry adds `remote`, keep the top-level command fail-closed and do not place it in REMOTE_ALLOWED or TELEGRAM_ALLOWED. Typed worker subcommands enforce their own R0/R1/R2 envelope policy and R3 denial.
